title: How To Build a Website With 24/7 AI Sales Agent in 45 Seconds
summary: Readdy is a no-code platform for building websites with 24/7 AI sales agents that handle lead qualification and appointment booking. The tool enables automatic customer interaction and inventory management through AI chatbots trained on business data.
writeup: The video demonstrates Readdy, a no-code platform for building websites that include a 24/7 AI sales agent. The agent handles lead qualification and appointment booking, and the chatbot is trained on business data to support automatic customer interaction and inventory management. Additional concepts referenced include lead enrichment and white-label deployment.
